form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 3rd in a small field at this track on April 2 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Sercan Bey carrying 56kg at $3.90. Before that 4th of 7 at this track on March 17 over 2000m, 12 len behind Salonikator carrying 56kg at $3.35. Working up to a win. Worth following.

form.formComment: Last start 4th in a small field at Yesiloba All Weather on March 31 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Whisper Of Victory with 58kg at $1.45. The start before that favourite; won by 1.75 len at Yesiloba All Weather March 22 over 1200m defeating Maximus Man with 58.5kg at $1.90. Rates highly. Big chance.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 2nd in a small field at this track on March 5 over 1300m, 1.1 len behind Snow Leopard with 52kg at $15.50. Second run from a spell ran last of 14 at Sirinyer in G3 on March 29 over 1700m, in the wet; 62 len behind Kralin Dansi with 56kg at $13.15. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four months break. Not seen since he finished last of 7 at this track December 9 over 1400m, 36 len behind Speedtail with 59kg at $6.
